name: Braunburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all the ingredients together until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into 5 patties, each approximately 3/4-inch thick.
3. Heat a grill or broiler pan at medium distance from the heat (about 4-inches).
4. Cook the patties, turning them once halfway through to ensure even cooking.
5. Continue grilling until they reach your preferred level of doneness, which should take about 10 to 15 minutes in total.
